answer:
Raizo rebels against Lord Ozunu by cutting his face with a kyoketsu-shoge after being ordered to execute another kunoichi traitor like Kiriko. He then engages in combat against his fellow ninja kin on the skyscraper roof. This act of defiance leads to him falling into a river and beginning his fight against the Ozunu clan.

\boxed{\text{Raizo rebels by cutting Lord Ozunu's face with a kyoketsu-shoge and fighting his fellow ninja.}}
